Hacker News Confidence

Less annoying hacker news. (What is this?)

This site scrapes Hacker News once every 30 minutes, then sorts according to this formula, with upvotes as positive signals and comments as negative ones. In my experience, the best articles to read on HN are the ones with a high upvote-to-discussion ratio. Mostly because controversial pieces tend to produce a disproportionate number of comments compared to upvotes.


  1. Randomness on Apple Platforms (2024) 40 upvotes, 1 comments
  2. The AI Marketing BS Index 42 upvotes, 4 comments
  3. CERN levels up with new superconducting karts 351 upvotes, 79 comments
  4. Chess in SQL 166 upvotes, 39 comments
  5. A dot a day keeps the clutter away 509 upvotes, 155 comments
  6. Claude Code Unpacked : A visual guide 959 upvotes, 347 comments
  7. Show HN: 1-Bit Bonsai, the First Commercially Viable 1-Bit LLMs 380 upvotes, 143 comments
  8. Is BGP safe yet? 198 upvotes, 69 comments
  9. Intuiting Pratt Parsing 122 upvotes, 40 comments
  10. Ada and Spark on ARM Cortex-M – A Tutorial with Arduino and Nucleo Examples 38 upvotes, 9 comments
  11. Apple at 50 16 upvotes, 2 comments
  12. Ukrainian Drone Holds Position for 6 Weeks 57 upvotes, 17 comments
  13. StepFun 3.5 Flash is #1 cost-effective model for OpenClaw tasks (300 battles) 88 upvotes, 31 comments
  14. TurboQuant KV Compression and SSD Expert Streaming for M5 Pro and IOS 32 upvotes, 8 comments
  15. Show HN: CLI to order groceries via reverse-engineered REWE API (Haskell) 180 upvotes, 78 comments
  16. Claude Wrote a Full FreeBSD Remote Kernel RCE with Root Shell (CVE-2026-4747) 205 upvotes, 91 comments
  17. Show HN: Real-time dashboard for Claude Code agent teams 49 upvotes, 17 comments
  18. Consider the Greenland Shark (2020) 70 upvotes, 28 comments
  19. NASA Artemis II moon mission live launch broadcast 179 upvotes, 89 comments
  20. Show HN: Git bayesect – Bayesian Git bisection for non-deterministic bugs 19 upvotes, 5 comments
  21. An Introduction to Writing Systems and Unicode 18 upvotes, 5 comments
  22. The Document Foundation ejects its core developers 73 upvotes, 36 comments
  23. EmDash – a spiritual successor to WordPress that solves plugin security 281 upvotes, 173 comments
  24. Playing Wolfenstein 3D with one hand in 2026 23 upvotes, 9 comments
  25. The OpenAI Graveyard: All the Deals and Products That Haven't Happened 143 upvotes, 111 comments
  26. Ask HN: Who is hiring? (April 2026) 126 upvotes, 100 comments
  27. SpaceX Files to Go Public 27 upvotes, 15 comments
  28. AI for American-produced cement and concrete 70 upvotes, 61 comments
  29. Random numbers, Persian code: A mysterious signal transfixes radio sleuths 79 upvotes, 82 comments
  30. Show HN: Zerobox – Sandbox any command with file, network, credential controls 43 upvotes, 43 comments
